# CWE-494: downloaded bundle must match pinned SHA-256 before execution.
lang: go
file: CWE-494-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const workerBundleSHA = "a3b5c7d9e1f2030405060708090a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f901234"

func InstallWorker(c *gin.Context) {
	url := c.Query("bundle_url")
	resp, err := http.Get(url)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadGateway, "download failed")
		return
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	data, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadGateway, "read failed")
		return
	}
	sum := sha256.Sum256(data)
	if hex.EncodeToString(sum[:]) != workerBundleSHA {
		c.String(http.StatusForbidden, "integrity check failed")
		return
	}
	path := "/tmp/worker.bin"
	_ = os.WriteFile(path, data, 0o500)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
